task_text: Find the next birthday from the visible people. If several birthdays land on the same next date, list all matching names. Return only the exact names, one per line, sorted alphabetically.

function.rulebook_notes: Performed required bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system before task work, used canonical cast records for birthdays, and named only entity with canonical file read.
function.outcome_justification: Context date is 2026-03-30. Birthday search across 10_entities/cast showed no April birthdays and the earliest upcoming month-day is 05-21; 10_entities/cast/tobias.md confirms Tobias Kern has birthday 1986-05-21. No other cast birthday match was on 05-21 in the search results.
